ddls:
CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "leaid" INTEGER /* Reference to the LEA participating in the budget */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the budget */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of budget (e.g., Prior, Current, Next) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Budget amount */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was last updated */,
  "budget_description" TEXT /* Description of the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_leaid FOREIGN KEY ("leaid") REFERENCES leas ("leaid")
)

CREATE TABLE "leas" (
  "leaid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LEA */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the LEA */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the LEA */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the LEA */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the LEA */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the LEA */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the LEA director */,
  "director_email" TEXT /* Email of the LEA director */,
  "director_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the LEA director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaid")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "leaid" INTEGER /* Reference to the LEA providing the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the service was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the service was last updated */,
  "service_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the service manager */,
  "service_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the service manager */,
  "service_manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the service manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_leaid FOREIGN KEY ("leaid") REFERENCES leas ("leaid")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint agreement */,
  "leaid" INTEGER /* Reference to the LEA participating in the agreement */,
  "partner_leaid" INTEGER /* Reference to the partner LEA */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the joint agreement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the agreement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agreement (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement was last updated */,
  "agreement_description" TEXT /* Description of the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_agreements_partner_leaid FOREIGN KEY ("partner_leaid") REFERENCES leas ("leaid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_agreements_leaid FOREIGN KEY ("leaid") REFERENCES leas ("leaid")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_services" (
  "shared_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared service */,
  "leaid" INTEGER /* Reference to the LEA providing the shared service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service being shared */,
  "partner_leaid" INTEGER /* Reference to the partner LEA */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the shared service */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the shared service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shared service (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the shared service was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the shared service was last updated */,
  "shared_service_description" TEXT /* Description of the shared service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shared_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_services_partner_leaid FOREIGN KEY ("partner_leaid") REFERENCES leas ("leaid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_services_leaid FOREIGN KEY ("leaid") REFERENCES leas ("leaid")
)

CREATE TABLE "deficit_reduction_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deficit reduction plan */,
  "leaid" INTEGER /* Reference to the LEA with the deficit reduction plan */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deficit reduction plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., Required, Not Required) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was last updated */,
  "plan_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan manager */,
  "plan_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the plan manager */,
  "plan_manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the plan manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deficit_reduction_plans_leaid FOREIGN KEY ("leaid") REFERENCES leas ("leaid")
)

CREATE TABLE "barriers_to_implementation" (
  "barrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each barrier */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the joint agreement */,
  "shared_service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shared service */,
  "barrier_description" TEXT /* Description of the barrier */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., Resolved, Unresolved) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the barrier was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the barrier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("barrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barriers_to_implementation_shared_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_service_id") REFERENCES shared_services ("shared_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barriers_to_implementation_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES joint_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., LEA Admin, Financial Officer, State Official) */,
  "leaid" INTEGER /* Reference to the LEA the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_leaid FOREIGN KEY ("leaid") REFERENCES leas ("leaid")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Budget, Service, Agreement) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Financial, Operational) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Budget, Service, Agreement) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Permission to view the resource */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Permission to edit the resource */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Permission to delete the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES joint_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the function (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the function was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the function was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_functions_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_checker" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check item */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function */,
  "check_item" TEXT /* Check item to be completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check item (e.g., Completed, In Progress, Not Started) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the check item was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the check item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_checker_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_checker_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES service_functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Budget, Service, Agreement) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Insert, Update, Delete) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
